identity.name: DagzFlix
identity.mission: Create the most immersive, fluid, and premium streaming experience for French users, blending Netflix's content discovery with Apple's glassmorphism and motion physics.

typography.secondary_font: SF Pro Display (if available) or Inter Tight
rules: Headings must use tight tracking (-0.02em to -0.05em).
Body text should be legible with relaxed leading.
Use uppercase with wide spacing for metadata labels (GENRE, DATE).

glassmorphism.card: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-lg border border-white/5 bg-zinc-900/50 transition-all hover:border-white/20

hero.structure: absolute inset-0 w-full h-full object-cover z-0

grids.library: grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-5 xl:grid-cols-6 gap-4

horizontal_scroll.wrapper: flex gap-4 overflow-x-auto pb-8 snap-x snap-mandatory scrollbar-hide

principles: Spring physics for all interactive elements (buttons, cards).

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90 px-8 py-6 rounded-md font-bold text-lg shadow-lg shadow-primary/20 transition-all
buttons.glass: bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-md text-white border border-white/20 hover:bg-white/20 px-6 py-4 rounded-md font-semibold transition-all

cards.poster: aspect-[2/3] relative rounded-md overflow-hidden cursor-pointer group
cards.backdrop: aspect-video relative rounded-lg overflow-hidden cursor-pointer group

inputs.search: bg-black/50 border-white/10 focus:border-white/30 text-white placeholder:text-white/40 h-12 rounded-full px-6 backdrop-blur-sm

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. IMPLEMENT DARK THEME ONLY: Ensure 'class' strategy in Tailwind is respected, but default to dark styles.
2. PRESERVE FILE STRUCTURE: Use existing /app/frontend/src structure.
3. USE SHADCN: Customize existing Shadcn components in /components/ui to match the 'glass' aesthetic. Do not delete them, just style them.
4. MICRO-INTERACTIONS: Every button and card must have a hover state defined in Framer Motion or Tailwind.
5. FRENCH LANGUAGE: All hardcoded text must be in French.
6. MOCK DATA: Create a 'lib/mock-data.js' file to simulate Jellyfin API responses for development.
8. ERROR HANDLING: Use 'sonner' for all user feedback (login errors, saved to watchlist).
9. RESPONSIVE: Mobile first. Use 'vaul' drawer for movie details on mobile, modal on desktop.
universal_guidelines: Do not use generic centered layouts.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
